archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Tactical Utility & Precision)
reasoning: A gate agent's boarding pass scanner is a tactical, high-speed utility tool. It requires extreme clarity, high contrast for outdoor/bright gate lighting, and obvious visual feedback. We use an 'Aviation Amber' accent for scanner UI instead of generic SaaS blue.

spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#090A0C] pb-24

boarding_pass_card.structure: A specialized ticket component simulating physical boarding passes.
boarding_pass_card.container: relative bg-gradient-to-b from-[#FF9F0A]/10 via-[#1C1F26] to-[#121418] border border-[#FF9F0A]/30 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-lg p-0
boarding_pass_card.notches: absolute -left-3 -right-3 top-[-10px] flex justify-between pointer-events-none; use two w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-[#090A0C] border border-[#FF9F0A]/30 (masking the card edges)

scanner_viewfinder.container: relative w-full aspect-square max-w-[300px] mx-auto rounded-xl overflow-hidden bg-black/50 border border-white/10 shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(255,159,10,0.1)]
scanner_viewfinder.corners: absolute w-12 h-12 border-[#FF9F0A] border-4 rounded-xl
scanner_viewfinder.corner_tl: top-0 left-0 border-r-0 border-b-0 rounded-tl-xl rounded-tr-none rounded-bl-none
scanner_viewfinder.corner_tr: top-0 right-0 border-l-0 border-b-0 rounded-tr-xl rounded-tl-none rounded-br-none
scanner_viewfinder.corner_bl: bottom-0 left-0 border-r-0 border-t-0 rounded-bl-xl rounded-tl-none rounded-br-none
scanner_viewfinder.corner_br: bottom-0 right-0 border-l-0 border-t-0 rounded-br-xl rounded-tr-none rounded-bl-none

bingo_board_cell.base: aspect-square rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-mono transition-all duration-200 border
bingo_board_cell.filled: bg-[#FF9F0A]/20 border-[#FF9F0A]/50 text-[#FF9F0A] shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(255,159,10,0.2)] font-bold scale-105

bottom_tab_bar.container: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 max-w-md mx-auto h-20 bg-[#121418]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/10 flex items-center justify-around px-2 pb-safe z-50
bottom_tab_bar.tab_item: flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-16 h-12 gap-1

toast_overlay.success: bg-[#30D158]/20 border border-[#30D158] text-[#30D158] backdrop-blur-md rounded-xl p-4 flex items-center gap-3 shadow-lg
toast_overlay.error: bg-[#FF453A]/20 border border-[#FF453A] text-[#FF453A] backdrop-blur-md rounded-xl p-4 flex items-center gap-3 shadow-lg

icons.library: lucide-react (Map to Expo Vector Icons if strictly building native, but use lucide-react for the web app implementation)

motion.scan_animation: Keyframes: 0% { top: 5%; opacity: 0 } 10% { opacity: 1 } 50% { top: 95%; opacity: 1 } 90% { opacity: 1 } 100% { top: 5%; opacity: 0 }
motion.page_transition: Simple fade-in (opacity 0 to 1) duration-200 for tab switching.
motion.list_stagger: Framer motion staggerChildren 0.05s for passenger list rows.

accessibility.touch_targets: All interactive elements in tab bar and lists are minimum 44x44px.
accessibility.test_ids: CRITICAL: Add `data-testid` to ALL interactive elements (e.g., `data-testid="tab-scan"`, `data-testid="btn-manual-submit"`, `data-testid="input-flight-number"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React Web/Tailwind/Shadcn mimicking a mobile app layout (max-w-md, bottom fixed tab bar).
Enforce dark mode globally. Add `bg-[#090A0C]` to the body/root element.
Implement the custom 'boarding_pass_card' using HTML/Tailwind exactly as described with pseudo-elements or absolute positioned circles to cut out the side notches.
Create the scanning viewfinder overlay with the corner borders and an animated scanning line.
For icons, use `lucide-react`. The problem statement mentioned `@expo/vector-icons`, but for this React Web environment implementation, Lucide is appropriate and maintains the aesthetic.
The Bingo board should use a dense CSS grid.
Use standard browser `localStorage` to mock the `AsyncStorage` requirement for flight configuration and passenger lists.
Ensure all input fields (flight number, routing) use Shadcn UI components styled to fit the dark tactical theme (border-white/20, focus:border-[#FF9F0A]).
MUST include `data-testid` attributes on all buttons, tabs, inputs, and list items.
